name: Ivanti ITSM & Neurons API
what_it_does: Ivanti Neurons REST API for IT service management and endpoint automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage incident, problem, change, and service request workflows, automate endpoint discovery and patching through Neurons, access CMDB and asset inventory data, retrieve service desk tickets and SLA metrics, manage user provisioning workflows, integrate with monitoring and security tools, and connect ITSM data with broader IT operations automation pipelines.
use_cases: Managing ITIL incident and change workflows from IT operations agents
Automating endpoint patching and discovery from Neurons automation agents
Accessing CMDB asset data from IT asset management agents
Retrieving SLA metrics and service desk analytics from reporting agents
not_for: Simple helpdesk without ITIL compliance requirements
Non-IT service management without endpoint management needs
Small teams without enterprise ITSM budget
best_when: An enterprise IT team using Ivanti ITSM or Neurons wants AI agents to automate incident routing, endpoint patching, CMDB updates, and change management workflows.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Ivanti ITSM contains sensitive enterprise IT infrastructure data. Endpoint automation agents have privileged access across systems. Change management automation must include proper approval gates.

auth.notes: Ivanti uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Tenant-level credentials. Scopes control ITSM modules, Neurons endpoints, and CMDB access. On-premises and cloud deployments have different auth configurations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise ITSM pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-agent and per-endpoint licensing; enterprise contracts
pricing.notes: South Jordan, Utah. Formed 2017 by merger of LANDESK and HEAT Software. Acquired Cherwell Software 2021. Major enterprise ITSM and UEM vendor. Neurons is their AI-powered automation platform. Competed with ServiceNow, BMC, Cherwell. Major enterprise customer base.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per tenant; enterprise SLA-based

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Enterprise IT infrastructure data requires strict access controls
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 and API key
On-premises vs cloud deployments have different API endpoints and auth flows
Neurons automation agents have privileged endpoint access — scope automation carefully
Change management automation must include approval gates to prevent unauthorized changes
Multi-module platform — ITSM, Neurons, UEM have separate API surfaces
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise IT infrastructure and endpoint data. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP option. OAuth2 + API key. Multi-region data residency. Privileged endpoint access requires careful scope management.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise IT infrastructure data. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP. OAuth2 + API key. Multi-region. Privileged endpoint access.
